issue.title: Align WP_Http helper detail rows with compiler-emitted shells

artifacts.role: progress detail rows for WPHX-312.62, WPHX-312.63, and WPHX-312.64

claims: The WPHX-312.62 detail row now describes the accepted WPHX PHP compiler-emitted grouped original-path WP_Http::processHeaders adapter evidence.
The WPHX-312.63 detail row now describes the accepted WPHX PHP compiler-emitted grouped original-path WP_Http::buildCookieHeader(&$r) adapter evidence.
The WPHX-312.64 detail row now describes the accepted WPHX PHP compiler-emitted grouped original-path protected WP_Http::parse_url adapter evidence.
The corrected rows keep whole-file WP_Http, WP_Http::request, live transport, installed distribution, and generated WP_Http_Cookie ownership outside the bounded helper claims.
non_claims: This receipt does not change runtime behavior, runner behavior, Haxe source, generated PHP, or the accepted ownership boundary.
This receipt does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership, full WP_Http::request ownership, live HTTP transport behavior, or installed distribution replacement.
